TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Quzi, title = Quzi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quzi} }

S.FORM: alang Quzi ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 119 buwan, 294 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 54% kyan ku 158 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 46% kyan ku 136 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Quzi hya' ga Balung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Quzi ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 119 buwan, 294 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 54% kyan ku 158 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 46% kyan ku 136 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Quzi hya' ga Balung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč quzi …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, . maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na quzi ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na quzi ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na quzi ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na quzi ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na quzi ńßja Ē …£a ő≤aluŇč. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
